items.stem: In phase 9, why is 'our brands' a suitable chemistry/biochemistry insertion candidate?

options.text: Because any product page is chemistry-relevant regardless of evidence.
Because it is selected using technical/flavor density rather than pure marketing signals.

Because chemistry phases no longer use scored filtering.
